title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #6, Nami, Perospero, Unknown person #7 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moment she realizes there isn't any cake on this ship,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must send her over to pudding, on cacao Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think that's what we should be worrying about...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's the coast! Get on the sunny!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So our forces were the ones wiped out

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: by that lightning blast, huh. OnGood

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Brook?! Chopper?! What the heck is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So you're still alive, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of you, back into the mirror world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: will be collapsed at his feet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry! Get in the mirror! J- just in case, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we got beaten to the punch by trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As I'm sure you can see!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Go around it! Get to the ship!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
